curatorNote:
Hobbs' 1/1 contract features four works (Return Zero, Elektroanima, One One Overflow and Days Fade) that exemplify his merging of manual and computational processes, whether through hand-drawn curves or algorithmic dot placement.

Hivemind holds three of four works on the contract. One One Overflow embraces algorithmic unpredictability and imperfection; Elektroanima explores the interplay between hand-drawn mark and algorithmic precision; and Return Zero [Blue] establishes the flowing curves and geometric shapes that would later evolve into Fidenza.
